# Kanban Board Visual Reference

```
    в”Ӯ      AC     в”Ӯ

```

## Solo Developer Rule Visualization

### вң… GOOD - Respecting the WIP Limit

```
IN PROGRESS (2/2)
в”ңв”Җ рҹ”Ё Implement feature X
в””в”Җ рҹҗӣ Fix bug in component Y

Status: вң… At capacity, finish before starting new work
```

### вҡ пёҸ WARNING - WIP Limit Exceeded

```
IN PROGRESS (3/2) вҡ пёҸ
в”ңв”Җ рҹ”Ё Implement feature X
в”ңв”Җ рҹҗӣ Fix bug in component Y  
в””в”Җ рҹҺЁ Refactor module Z

Status: вҡ пёҸ LIMIT EXCEEDED - Focus on completing items!
Action: Move items to Review/Verify or stop new work
```

## Column Capacity Guidelines

| Column        | Recommended Capacity | Hard Limit |
|---------------|---------------------|------------|
| Backlog       | Unlimited           | None       |
| Ready         | 3-5 items           | None       |
| In Progress   | 1-2 items           | **2**      |
| Review/Verify | 1-3 items           | None       |
| Done          | Archive weekly      | None       |

## State Transitions

### Valid Transitions

```
Backlog вҶ’ Ready          вң… When issue is fully defined
Ready вҶ’ In Progress      вң… When starting work (check WIP limit)
In Progress вҶ’ Review     вң… When code is complete
Review вҶ’ In Progress     вң… When changes are needed
Review вҶ’ Done            вң… When approved and merged
Done вҶ’ In Progress       вҡ пёҸ Only when reopening work (rare)
```

### Invalid Transitions (Avoid)

```
Backlog вҶ’ In Progress    вқҢ Should go through Ready first
Backlog вҶ’ Done           вқҢ Work must go through proper flow
In Progress вҶ’ Done       вқҢ Must be reviewed/verified first
Ready вҶ’ Done             вқҢ Work must be done first
```

## Labels and Their Meanings

| Label              | Color  | Meaning                          |
|--------------------|--------|----------------------------------|
| `backlog`          | Purple | Issue is in backlog              |
| `ready`            | Green  | Issue is ready to be worked      |
| `in-progress`      | Orange | Issue is being actively worked   |
| `review-verify`    | Purple | Issue is in review/verification  |
| `wip-limit-exceeded`| Red   | Too many issues in progress      |

## Quick Reference

### When to Move Cards

| Trigger                          | Action                   |
|----------------------------------|--------------------------|
| New idea/bug                     | Add to **Backlog**       |
| Issue fully defined              | Move to **Ready**        |
| Starting work (< 2 in progress)  | Move to **In Progress**  |
| Code complete, PR open           | Move to **Review/Verify**|
| Review needs changes             | Move to **In Progress**  |
| Approved, merged, deployed       | Move to **Done**         |

### Red Flags рҹҡ©

- **3+ issues in In Progress** вҶ’ WIP limit violation
- **Issues stuck in Review/Verify > 1 week** вҶ’ Process bottleneck
- **Ready column empty** вҶ’ Need to groom backlog
- **No items moving to Done** вҶ’ Check for blockers

## Color Coding (Suggested)

```
рҹ”ө Ready        - Blue (calm, prepared)
рҹҹЎ In Progress  - Yellow (active, attention)
рҹҹЈ Review       - Purple (thoughtful, careful)
рҹҹў Done         - Green (success, complete)
вҡӘ Backlog      - Gray (future, low priority)
```

## Tips for Success

1. **Start your day by reviewing the board**
2. **Never exceed 2 items in In Progress**
3. **Move cards immediately when status changes**
4. **Write clear acceptance criteria in Ready**
5. **Celebrate when moving to Done!** рҹҺү
